overview: G. Narayanamma Institute of Technology and Science (GNITS) for Women, established in 1997 by the G. Pulla Reddy Charities Trust, is a premier autonomous engineering college in Hyderabad. It was founded with the specific mission of empowering women through high-quality technical education. The institute has consistently ranked among the top engineering colleges in Telangana and is known for its academic excellence and high placement standards in the software industry.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade. All eligible undergraduate programs are NBA accredited. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with JNTU-Hyderabad (JNTUH). ISO 9001:2015 certified.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, IT, ECE, EEE, ETE, CST)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for reserved) + TG-EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, CNIS, Digital Electronics, PEED, WMC)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / TS PGECET score
Diploma in Engineering with valid TS ECET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are strictly merit-based. 70% seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling (TGCHE) based on TG-EAPCET ranks. 30% (Category B) are Management Quota seats filled based on institutional merit/JEE ranks. Counseling Code: GNIT.
admissions.importantDates: TG-EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; Hall Ticket: Released April 27, 2026; TS PGECET 2026: May 2026; Counseling: July 2026.

facilities: Central Library with massive Digital Repository
campus.specialNote: Located in Shaikpet, the campus is heart-of-the-city accessible. GNITS is renowned for its technical fests like 'PRAGNYA' and strong alumni networks. It maintains a 'Women Empowerment Cell' and an 'Entrepreneurship Development Cell' to nurture leadership among students.

contact.address: Shaikpet Road, Ambedkar Nagar, Shaikpet, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500104
